## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] I started new behavior or a bug fix with a failing test.
- [ ] I added or updated regression tests for the changed behavior.
- [ ] I ran the relevant Release build and tests locally.
- [ ] Security and trust boundaries are unchanged, or the change is documented and tested.
- [ ] API or persisted-file contracts are unchanged, or compatibility and migration are documented.
- [ ] PDF output is unchanged, or the golden reference change has a reviewed reason.
- [ ] Native RVT/DWG files are never uploaded to Erk-S Cloud.
- [ ] README and architecture/security documentation match the implementation.

## Risk

List data migration, cloud sync, PDF fidelity, signing, or rollback risks.
